title: Release v7.0 — 2026-03-03
text:
# Flowdesk Release v7.0 (2026-03-03)

## New
- Shipped **SSO/SAML support** in User Management & SSO. This directly addresses top customer requests.
## Fixed
- Resolved User Management & SSO performance issues affecting Enterprise accounts.
- Fixed webhook delivery reliability.

## Impact
Early data shows User Management & SSO support tickets down after this release.
